description: No installation or invocation instructions — CLAUDE.md has no 'claude plugin install' command or equivalent usage guidance
suggested_fix: Add a 'Usage' section with: claude plugin install simmer@2389-research --scope project, and the trigger phrases that activate the skill.

description: tests/integration/simmer-scenario.md exists but CLAUDE.md provides no command or instructions to run the integration tests
suggested_fix: Add a 'Testing' section referencing tests/integration/simmer-scenario.md and how to execute the scenarios.

description: More than 60% of CLAUDE.md is descriptive content (overview, tables, flow diagrams, key design decisions) rather than actionable instructions
suggested_fix: Add installation, development workflow, and test commands to raise the actionable content ratio above 40%.

description: CLAUDE.md has no prerequisites section — does not state 'none required' or list required tools/versions for the plugin
suggested_fix: Add a 'Prerequisites' section. For a pure-markdown plugin this can be a single line: 'None — no build step or external dependencies required.'

description: Orchestrator SKILL.md is 550 lines, exceeding the 500-line ceiling; the single-agent mode section (lines ~405-418) and context discipline table add ~35 lines that could be extracted
suggested_fix: Extract the single-agent mode section to a linked reference or trim non-essential commentary to get under 500 lines.

description: Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in '(or appropriate extension matching artifact type)' — no measurable criteria for extension selection
suggested_fix: Replace with an enumeration: '(matching the artifact type: .md for text/prompts, .yaml for config, .py for code, etc.)'.

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Judges must read the relevant artifacts before scoring' — no specification of which artifacts are relevant
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit list: 'Judges must read the candidate file, evaluator script, config files, and prior candidate files before scoring.'

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Reference prior iterations when relevant' — no condition specified for when prior iterations are relevant
suggested_fix: Replace with a condition: 'Reference prior iterations when the ASI builds on, contradicts, or repeats a previous direction.'

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Give each judge relevant capabilities from the primitive library' — no criteria for which capabilities are relevant to which judge roles
suggested_fix: Replace with role-based guidance: 'Give each judge capabilities matched to their role — see example compositions table for which primitives apply to evaluator analyst, constraint realist, etc.'

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Apply relevant ones to each judge based on their role'
suggested_fix: Remove this sentence — the preceding example compositions table already specifies which primitives apply to which roles, making this redundant guidance.

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'read the candidate, evaluator output, and relevant code/config' — 'relevant' does not specify which code or config files to read
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'read the candidate, evaluator output, evaluator script, and config files.'

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Extract what's relevant to the criteria' — no measurable guidance for which evaluator output maps to which criteria
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'Extract failure counts, metric values, and error patterns that map directly to each scoring criterion.'

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'search for relevant techniques' — no specification of what makes a technique relevant
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'search for solutions to the specific failure pattern identified (e.g., post-processing normalization for fuzzy-match failures, chain-of-thought prompting for multi-step reasoning failures).'

description: Vague quantifier 'some' in 'If some fields are missing or ambiguous' — 'some' provides no measurable threshold for when the conversational path is triggered vs. skipping to Phase 5
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'If any required field (artifact path/content, criteria descriptions, evaluation method) cannot be inferred from inspection alone,'

description: CLAUDE.md directory structure listing (lines 82-91) omits skills/simmer-judge-board/ — the subdirectory exists on disk and simmer-judge-board is referenced in the Subskills table at line 20, but the directory tree is incomplete
suggested_fix: Add simmer-judge-board/ and its SKILL.md entry to the directory tree in CLAUDE.md, between simmer-judge/ and simmer-reflect/.
